title: Refactor loops with at most one iteration
description: Loops with at most one iteration can confuse developers and make the code less readable. This rule arises when the following statements are misplaced: break, return, throw. Use if statements instead or fix the loop so it can be executed multiple times.
recommendation: Use if statements instead or fix the loop so it can be executed multiple times.

checks.message: Use if statements instead or fix the loop so it can be executed multiple times.
